integrationStatus.git_advanced: Empty - Need advanced Git features documentation

instructions.addingDocuments: Place resources in appropriate subdirectories. Update this index.json with document metadata including title, author, description, license, topics, and relevance.
instructions.downloadingSources: Download from official Git documentation, Git SCM, and reputable Git resources. Prioritize official Git documentation.
instructions.namingConvention: Use clear, descriptive filenames with underscores: guide_name.pdf, reference_name.html
instructions.licenseCompliance: Include license information for all resources. Prioritize official Git documentation.
instructions.gitFocus: Resources should enable SWEObeyMe to: (1) understand Git commands and operations, (2) support branch management, (3) implement commit message generation, (4) handle Git integration features, (5) support checkpoint and revert functionality.
